site.name: Gurdeep Singh
site.heroSummary: Lead DevOps engineer with 6+ years of experience building secure, cloud-native platforms on AWS, Kubernetes, and modern CI/CD systems for banking, fintech, and e-commerce workloads.
about: I specialize in platform engineering, Kubernetes operations, AWS infrastructure, and delivery automation across production environments that demand scale, resilience, and strong security controls.

My experience spans building EKS platforms from scratch, leading DevOps modernization, improving observability and cost efficiency, and enabling teams with reliable CI/CD, infrastructure as code, and operational automation.

skills.intro: My technical work centers on AWS platform engineering, Kubernetes operations, infrastructure automation, observability, and DevSecOps for high-availability production systems.

outages.intro: These entries summarize the kinds of production issues, resilience work, and recovery responsibilities I have owned across banking, e-commerce, and messaging platforms.

items.title: Mission-Critical Banking Platform Reliability on AWS EKS
items.situation: Owned end-to-end cloud infrastructure for a production banking platform running on AWS EKS, where stability, security, observability, and controlled change management were critical.
actions: Architected and deployed a production-grade EKS platform from scratch, including VPC design, node groups, and cluster hardening.
Managed microservices infrastructure with Istio for traffic management, observability, and mTLS-based service security.
Supported event-driven workloads with Kafka, Airflow, and EMR on EKS while maintaining availability, scalability, and operational control.
items.outcome: Delivered a resilient cloud platform foundation for a mission-critical banking workload with stronger reliability, security, and scalability.

items.title: Disaster Recovery Readiness and Failover Automation
items.situation: Supported Linux-based production environments where minimizing downtime and preparing for recovery scenarios were key operational responsibilities.
actions: Monitored infrastructure and application health using Site24x7 to detect issues early and respond proactively.
Automated routine operational workflows with Shell/Bash and Ansible to reduce manual recovery effort.
Supported active disaster recovery planning and automated DR switch procedures for faster recovery during operational issues.
items.outcome: Improved operational readiness and reduced the effort required to execute recovery actions under pressure.

items.title: High-Traffic E-commerce Production Stability
items.situation: Managed AWS infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and observability tooling for high-traffic e-commerce workloads that required fast diagnosis and dependable platform behavior.
actions: Scaled and maintained AWS services across compute, storage, networking, and container platforms for production workloads.
Deployed and monitored EFK, Grafana, and New Relic to improve real-time visibility into platform health and application behavior.
Strengthened traffic and edge protection with Kong, Varnish, and Cloudflare-based controls.
items.outcome: Improved platform resilience, production visibility, and deployment consistency across customer-facing services.

projects.intro: These are some of the platform, automation, and modernization initiatives I have led or contributed to across recent roles.

items.title: Production AWS EKS Platform Buildout
items.subtitle: Platform Engineering
items.summary: Built a production-grade AWS EKS platform from scratch for a banking workload, covering network design, cluster setup, hardening, and operational readiness.
outcomes: Established a secure and scalable Kubernetes foundation for mission-critical services.
Improved platform control with service mesh-based traffic management, observability, and mTLS.

items.title: Kubernetes Resource Optimization Solution
items.subtitle: Infrastructure Efficiency
items.summary: Built an optimization approach for Kubernetes workloads to improve cluster utilization and infrastructure efficiency across environments.
outcomes: Improved workload efficiency through better resource awareness and tuning.
Supported cost optimization goals alongside platform stability.

items.title: DevSecOps Controls in Delivery Pipelines
items.subtitle: CI/CD Modernization
items.stack: Jenkins, SAST, Dependency Scanning, Container Security
items.summary: Introduced DevSecOps practices into CI/CD pipelines so security checks became part of the standard delivery flow instead of a later-stage manual activity.
outcomes: Integrated static analysis, dependency scanning, and container security into deployment workflows.
Improved pipeline maturity and security posture across engineering environments.

items.title: Observability and Automation for E-commerce Platforms
items.subtitle: Reliability Engineering
items.stack: EFK, Grafana, New Relic, Jenkins, Python
items.summary: Strengthened production operations for high-traffic e-commerce systems through observability rollout, pipeline automation, and task automation scripting.
outcomes: Enabled better real-time monitoring, logging, and alerting across services.
Reduced repetitive operational work with Python-based automation.

items.title: Disaster Recovery Switch Automation
items.subtitle: Operational Continuity
items.summary: Supported disaster recovery preparedness by automating recovery switch procedures and improving operational response readiness for production systems.
outcomes: Reduced manual effort during DR execution and recovery workflows.
Improved business continuity preparedness through operational automation.

experience.intro: My experience spans DevOps, platform engineering, cloud infrastructure, observability, and operational automation across banking, e-commerce, and communication technology domains.

items.summary: Leading DevOps and platform engineering initiatives across internal product infrastructure and the Axis Bank ChargeNex engagement, with ownership spanning AWS, Kubernetes, security, cost optimization, and platform modernization.
highlights: Architected and deployed a production-grade AWS EKS platform from scratch, including network design, cluster setup, and hardening.
Led infrastructure reliability, modernization, OS/application patching, migration planning, and cost optimization efforts.
Introduced DevSecOps controls into CI/CD and mentored team members on Kubernetes, cloud best practices, and infrastructure operations.

items.summary: Managed and scaled AWS infrastructure, CI/CD systems, observability tooling, and container platforms for high-traffic e-commerce workloads.
highlights: Supported production workloads across EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, EKS, ECS, Route 53, and CloudFront.
Built and maintained Jenkins pipelines and shared libraries to improve deployment efficiency and reduce manual intervention.
Implemented automation, observability, and security controls using Python, EFK, Grafana, New Relic, Kong, Varnish, and Cloudflare WAF.

items.summary: Managed Linux-based production environments, operational automation, databases, monitoring, and disaster recovery support for business-critical services.
highlights: Automated operational workflows with Shell/Bash and Ansible to improve efficiency and reduce manual effort.
Administered MySQL and MongoDB environments and supported smooth deployments with minimal downtime.
Contributed to disaster recovery planning, failover automation, and delivery of the internal Infinito project.
